name: kktest-dev
description: kktest-dev plugins for Claude Code & Cowork. Developer-grade automation, starting with memory-keeper.

plugins.name: memory-keeper
plugins.description: Keep file-based agent memory lean and durable: compact the index, archive done/stale memories to cold storage, and lint the index against a byte budget.

plugins.name: focus-notify
plugins.description: Focus-aware desktop notifications for Claude Code. Notify only when your terminal is NOT the frontmost app. Three kinds (finished, approve, question), each with its own message and sound, plus click-to-focus on macOS/Linux.

plugins.name: kkskills-essentials
plugins.description: Generic, project-agnostic working skills (15) that self-improve over time — feedback discipline, clean-architecture & conventional-commits references, proactive task reminders, secret hygiene, concurrency/race-conditions, MCP server authoring, timezone handling, local-LLM selection, plus a meta-skill that folds new learnings back into the right skill (versioned, changelogged, self-contained). Skills-only.
